args.text: CVE-2026-30117: Session-fixation vulnerability in token refresh path. Severity: high. Affects auth-api and session-store. Patches available: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: CVE-2026-30117 (session-fixation vulnerability) remediation is beginning. Patch window confirmed for deployment of auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9.

args.text: CVE-2026-30117 patching complete. Verified: auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9. Both services successfully deployed and confirmed.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete. Both affected services have been successfully deployed with fixes: auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9. Proceeding with credential rotation.

args.text: CVE-2026-30117 credential rotation completed: (1) All active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) Signing keys rotated, (3) Old keys confirmed as rejected. Staff session re-establishment required.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of tonight's security maintenance to address CVE-2026-30117, all active sessions have been invalidated. Please sign in again to establish a new session. Thank you for your attention to this important security matter.
